leadText: The Parasol Pick (Japanese: パラソルピック Parasol Pick) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Parasol Pick can be used to complete a sandwich made during a picnic .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V Some complain that the parasol part of this pick is hard to hold on to, so your fingers get messy. Still, it's fun to twirl this all around after you've eaten.

sections.title: In the core series games
